ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Unique part number assigned by the manufacturer */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the component was added to the system */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the component was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., Operating Supply voltage) */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol for the parameter (e.g., VDD) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., numerical, string, boolean) */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit of measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES parameter_units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter the condition belongs to */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition (e.g., OSR 4096) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conditions_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each value set */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition the values belong to */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value for the condition */,
  "typ_value" REAL /* Typical value for the condition */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value for the condition */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the values (e.g., V, °C, µA) */,
  "tolerance" REAL /* Tolerance percentage for the values */,
  "note" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the values */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_values_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasheets" (
  "datasheet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each datasheet */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the datasheet belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the datasheet */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the datasheet was uploaded */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the datasheet */,
  "uploader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the datasheet */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the datasheet file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("datasheet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasheets_uploader_id FOREIGN KEY ("uploader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasheets_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application note */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the note belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the note */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the note was uploaded */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the application note */,
  "uploader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the note */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the application note file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_notes_uploader_id FOREIGN KEY ("uploader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_notes_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, designer, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the component */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES component_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_category_map" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being mapped */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the component belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_category_map_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_category_map_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES component_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Summary of changes in the version */,
  "uploader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who released the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_uploader_id FOREIGN KEY ("uploader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_version_map" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being mapped */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the component belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_version_map_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_version_map_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., V, °C, µA) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol for the unit (e.g., V, °C, µA) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)
